name: google-chat-mcp
description: Google Chat integration for PR review notifications. Uses the official Google Chat remote MCP server to post review summaries, stale PR alerts, and weekly reports to a designated Google Chat space.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a formatted message to a Google Chat space

space_id.description: Google Chat space ID. Defaults to the configured default_space if omitted.

text.description: Message body. Supports Google Chat markdown: *bold*, _italic_, `code`, and <url|link text> hyperlinks.

notes: Authentication is handled natively by Antigravity — click 'Authenticate' next to google-chat-mcp in the MCP panel and sign in with your Google Workspace account.
GOOGLE_CHAT_SPACE_ID can be found in the Chat space URL: spaces/{id}
The bot must be added to the target Chat space before it can post messages.
